Title: Fix comments IDOR: scope /drafts/:id/comments to workspace
Description: GET/POST /drafts/:id/comments (apps/api/src/routes/comments.ts:36) authenticate but never verify the draft belongs to the caller's workspace. Any valid JWT can read/write comments on any draft. Join drafts->campaigns->ad_accounts and assert workspace match before query. Verified in code.

Title: Upgrade vulnerable deps: xlsx, uuid, postcss; raise CI audit gate
Description: pnpm audit --prod: 2 high (xlsx@0.18.5 prototype pollution GHSA-4r6h-8v6p-xvw6 + ReDoS GHSA-5pgg-2g8v-p4x9), 3 moderate (uuid@10, postcss@8.5.6). Replace xlsx (exceljs already in tree) or upgrade; bump uuid/postcss; change CI audit step to --audit-level high. Retest export/import flows.

Title: Re-enable CI workflow and add branch protection on main
Description: CI (.github/workflows/ci.yml, 4 jobs, verified green locally) is disabled in GitHub Actions. Re-enable, then add branch protection: required checks typecheck/lint/test/build/security, >=1 review. Owner action + repo settings.

Title: Stripe webhook idempotency
Description: apps/api/src/routes/billing.ts webhook verifies signature but never dedupes event.id before handleWebhookEvent; Stripe retries re-process events. Add stripe_webhook_events table keyed on event.id; skip already-seen. Verified in code.

Title: Verify Meta/TikTok webhook signatures over raw body
Description: Current verification re-hashes parsed JSON, not original bytes (docs/KNOWN_LIMITATIONS.md #3); Meta signs raw body (X-Hub-Signature-256). Capture raw body via JSON body-parser verify hook and thread to handlers. Also a Meta platform-compliance expectation.

Title: Per-route rate limits on AI endpoints (/agent, /rag)
Description: Only the global authenticated limiter (100 req/min) applies (apps/api/src/routes/agent.ts, rag.ts); a single user can hammer AI endpoints and burn credits/cost. Add tight per-endpoint limiter.

Title: Re-encrypt legacy plaintext OAuth tokens; delete dead token code
Description: Decrypt path (apps/api/src/infrastructure/platform/metaToken.ts:24) passes through values lacking enc:v1: prefix, so pre-encryption rows stay plaintext forever. One-time re-encryption migration; warn/fail on plaintext in prod. Also delete dead decryptStoredToken in platforms/meta/client.ts:2242 (exported, never called, stale TODO).

Title: SSRF guard on webhook-config URLs + clamp admin pagination
Description: webhooks-config.ts:59 validates URL format only - users can target localhost/internal IPs. Block private/loopback ranges. Separately admin.ts:119 accepts uncapped limit param - clamp to 100/500 like other routes.

Title: E2E test suite for core flows + CI job
Description: Only 6 page-load smoke tests exist (tests/smoke). Zero coverage: signup->first campaign, campaign CRUD, billing/subscription, integration connect, invite. Build Playwright suites for these 4 money paths and add e2e job to ci.yml with report artifact.

Title: Add web-side error reporting (Sentry)
Description: apps/web has no error reporting - global-error.tsx logs to console only; API already has Sentry wiring. Add @sentry/nextjs, init in providers, wire boundaries + 401/403 paths.

Title: GDPR tooling: data export, cascading deletion, retention jobs
Description: No user/workspace data-export or cascading-delete endpoints exist; no retention schedule or automated purge. Required for DPA/due diligence and Meta deletion-callback obligations. Build export (machine-readable), workspace/user delete cascade, retention config + purge jobs.

Title: Build invite acceptance flow
Description: Onboarding references team invites and i18n strings exist (inviteEmail/inviteRole/inviteSuccess) but there is no /auth/invite/[token] route or token handling in signup - invited users cannot self-onboard. Build acceptance page + token validation + auto-filled signup.

Title: Document backups/DR + run restore drill
Description: No restore procedure, RTO/RPO, or Redis persistence notes (Supabase-managed DB). Write docs/BACKUP_RESTORE.md, define RTO/RPO, run and document one restore drill. Buyers ask for evidence restores were tested.

Title: Write DEPLOYMENT.md, RUNBOOK.md, ARCHITECTURE.md
Description: Deploy is Coolify-API-driven (deploy.yml) but undocumented in-repo; no rollback runbook; README claims Clean Architecture with no architecture doc. Three docs to kill the bus-factor objection in diligence.

Title: Sync .env.example + fail-fast env validation at boot
Description: ~15 used env keys missing from apps/api/.env.example (ENCRYPTION_MASTER_KEY, STRIPE_*, ANTHROPIC/OPENAI keys, GOOGLE_ADS_*, SENTRY_DSN, HEALTH_CHECK_TOKEN...). Sync the example and call validateEncryptionEnv() (security/encryption.ts:442) during boot, exiting on missing required config.

Title: Start Meta Tech Provider verification + Google token tier/RMF gap analysis
Description: Process work with longest lead time before write-path launch: Meta Business Verification + Tech Provider registration + App Review (ads_read/ads_management/business_management); confirm Google Ads developer token tier and run Required Minimum Functionality gap analysis (write access for external users triggers RMF). Also verify Meta API version >= v24 before 2026-06-09 deprecation cliff.

Title: Fix i18n leaks: ContactForm + DataTable empty state
Description: components/marketing/ContactForm.tsx (8+ hardcoded English strings incl. labels and errors) and components/ui/data-table.tsx:62 ('No data' empty state used on every list page) bypass next-intl across all 10 locales. Move to message catalogs + translate.

Title: Accessibility pass: aria-labels, table sort controls, dialog focus
Description: ~15 aria-labels across the entire component tree; icon-only buttons (sidebar, mobile nav, settings) and DataTable sort buttons unlabeled. WCAG 2.1 AA risk for enterprise buyers. Auth forms are the good pattern to copy.

Title: Scope Google webhook tenant resolution by platform
Description: webhook-handler.ts matches campaign/adset on platform-native IDs without a platform predicate; same ad account linked in two workspaces can route events to the wrong tenant (KNOWN_LIMITATIONS #4).

Title: Approval workflow + change log + kill switch, then enable draft execution
Description: Core value prop is gated (v1_pilot_platform_execution_disabled). Platforms effectively require human-visible controls for automated changes: human approval step for AI drafts, immutable change log, dry-run mode, per-platform kill switch. Build that layer, then un-gate execution behind it.

Title: Real TikTok integration (production review) + Snapchat OAuth app
Description: TikTok: app registration, specific use-case narrative, sandbox->production review, business verification, data-security check; timestamped HMAC webhook verification. Snapchat: Business Manager OAuth app with snapchat-marketing-api scope; vault long-lived refresh tokens. Replaces ENABLE_MOCK_SOCIAL_SYNC mocks.

Title: Persist recurring report schedules to Postgres
Description: Schedules live only in Redis; a flush drops them (KNOWN_LIMITATIONS #6). Persist to scheduled_reports-style table, rehydrate worker on boot. Also resolves ReportParams.workspaceId typing skip.

Title: Client-side token refresh on 401
Description: AuthProvider/authFetch read token from localStorage with no refresh-on-401; users are logged out abruptly mid-session. Add refresh-and-retry interceptor with backoff.

Title: Minimal feature-flag / kill-switch mechanism
Description: No runtime gating exists (env flags are deploy-time only). DB-backed flags or Unleash for: sync, AI execution, billing, signup. Prerequisite for safe write-path rollout.

Title: BullMQ graceful drain + sync-job idempotency keys
Description: Shutdown path (apps/api/src/index.ts:368) closes HTTP but workers are not drained on SIGTERM; sync jobs lack idempotency keys so redeploys can orphan/double-run work.

Title: Add Supabase RLS policies to core tables
Description: No ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY anywhere in migrations. Backend scopes all queries, but RLS is the defense-in-depth layer if anything ever hits Supabase directly (realtime, future clients).

Title: Email verification at signup
Description: Signup currently requires no email verification (KNOWN_LIMITATIONS #5). Product decision + SMTP flow.

Title: Publish OpenAPI spec + enforce coverage in CI
Description: Spec is generated at runtime (/api/v2/openapi.json + Scalar UI) but never exported/published - export during build and upload artifact. Separately: coverage thresholds configured in vitest.config.ts are not enforced or reported in CI - add gate + upload.

Title: Fix version skew + release automation
Description: VERSION file says 1.0.0, package.json 2.0.0, packages/shared 1.0.0. Single-source the version and add changesets-based release flow.

Title: Escape user content in report-generator HTML
Description: workers/report-generator.ts builds HTML via string concat without escaping campaign/ad names (email templates were fixed in PR #150; this path was missed). Reuse escapeHtml.

Title: Explicit platform declaration for API-key scope checks
Description: middleware/scopeCheck.ts:166 derives platform from request-supplied values; multi-platform endpoints can evade per-platform scopes. Routes should declare their platform requirement.

Title: Paginate/virtualize unbounded lists (integrations, AI rules)
Description: IntegrationsContent.tsx and AIAgentContent.tsx render full lists with no pagination/virtualization.

Title: DB pool metrics + readiness check for encryption key
Description: Export pool utilization gauges (connection.ts:49) and add encryption-key validity to /ready (index.ts:190).

Title: Paginate audit-log endpoint; gate admin mock-data to dev
Description: routes/audit-log.ts list endpoint unpaginated; routes/admin.ts:100 returns mock-data fallbacks not gated to development.

Title: Delete stale TODOs pointing at implemented code
Description: DLQ TODO in email-worker.ts:246 (DLQ exists in all 3 workers) and dead decryptStoredToken with KMS TODO (meta/client.ts:2247). Stale TODOs spook diligence reviewers.

Title: Integration test: refresh tokens rejected after password reset
Description: Revocation is implemented (transactional revokeAllRefreshTokensForUser + Supabase global signOut) but untested end-to-end. Add test asserting old refresh token fails post-reset.

Title: Locale-aware og:locale + timezone-aware date formatting
Description: openGraph.locale hardcoded en_US in app/layout.tsx:34; formatDate (lib/utils.ts) ignores user timezone. Set og:locale from route param; add user timezone preference.

Title: Unify API error envelope (upload routes vs global middleware)
Description: Upload router uses {success,message,error}; global middleware uses {success,error:{code,message}}. Breaking change - coordinate with client; deferred from PR #150 review.

Title: Nonce-based CSP for styles
Description: style-src still allows unsafe-inline; move to nonce-based CSP. Deferred from PR #150 scope.

Title: Python MCP server: pytest suite + CI job + lock file
Description: apps/mcp has 30+ tools, zero tests, no CI job, no lock file. Write pytest suite with mocked API, add CI job, pin via lock.

Title: Compliance artifact pack: DPA, subprocessor list, IR policy, status page
Description: Pre-SOC2 table stakes buyers request: Art.28 DPA template, public subprocessor page + change notifications, written incident-response policy, access-review cadence doc, public status page with uptime history. Mostly business-side authoring.

Title: License scan + SBOM in CI; verify contributor IP assignments
Description: Run license-checker/SCA in CI, produce SBOM, confirm no GPL/AGPL in proprietary code. Business side: collect signed IP assignments from all past contributors/contractors - the #1 deal-killer in DD.
